calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Starr Y. Lee

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Matter not reported

Johnathan Vaknin, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank.
No appearance by Defendant Starr Y. Lee.

The court reviews the filed documents as evidence submitted by Mr. Vaknin.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, and against Defendant Starr Y. Lee

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank is awarded judgment against Defendant Starr Y. Lee as follows:

Damages/Principal: $10,535.36
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Costs: $370.00

Total Judgment: $10,905.36

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted
Off Calendar Dec-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Prior to open court, counel appeared in an abundance of caution. There is no appearance by Defendant Starry Lee at 9am.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo's unopposed Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates Plaintiff properly served Requests for Admission and Defendant Starr Y. Lee did not provide any responses to Plaintiff's requests. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.) Defendant's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement when no responses have been provided. Plaintiffs, however, conferred.

Plaintiffs' RFAs, Set One, dated August 20, 2025, are deemed admitted.

Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-05-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
